name: backrooms
description:
Step into the unsettling void of the Backrooms — a place where reality frays and every corner hides a whisper of something forgotten. In this slowburn, dreamcore RPG, you’re trapped within 7 twisted levels, each more surreal and haunting than the last. Flickering lights hum above endless yellow halls, shadowy entities watch from the edges of perception, and the oppressive silence weighs heavy on your mind.

Every choice you make carves a path through this nightmarish labyrinth. Will you cautiously explore each level, uncovering fragile fragments of lost memories and eerie secrets? Or will you sprint blindly, desperate for escape but risking the unknown dangers lurking just out of sight? The slow passage of time frays your sanity — and lingering too long might mean more than just madness.

Here, the boundaries between fear, hope, and despair blur. Will you find a way out? Choose to stay, surrendering to the darkness? Or lose yourself forever, swallowed by the endless maze? The Backrooms shift and breathe with your decisions, crafting a uniquely haunting experience — one that lingers long after the game ends.

Prepare to confront isolation, uncertainty, and the creeping dread of the unknown. This isn’t just a game — it’s a psychological descent into a world where reality is as fragile as your will to survive.

DeepSeek recommended


might make part 2 with level 8,9,10 and more levels
creator: Daimos nova
